subcodes.first_line: O Shahriyar! Cry at the top of thy voice: The century of the Manifestation of His Holiness Baha'u'llah is the effulgence of the Friend
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شهریار فریاد برآر که عصر ظهور حضرت بهاء الله جلوه یار است و نافه مشکبار بر
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
